exercise_requirement: Collect a genuine independently annotated subset and compare filtering, agreement weighting, confidence weighting, and soft targets.
research_question: How do label confidence and inter-annotator agreement affect calibration and performance on clear versus ambiguous examples?
hypothesis: Agreement-aware training may improve calibration on ambiguous PARTIAL_MATCH cases without inflating clear-case accuracy.
random_seed_policy: primary seed 42; retained comparisons repeat seeds 42, 43, and 44
prerequisites: At least two real independent human annotators.
Do not infer or fabricate agreement from existing single-author labels.
safety_notes: Human agreement metrics must be based on genuine independent annotations.
Do not simulate annotators or report synthetic agreement as human evidence.
Train and validation evidence only; test remains locked.
